control.F: Does not prove A1 bounded mass for CKN-scale rescalings or any Clay claim.
control.L: shell envelope -> proxy mass atoms -> Abel/log windows -> fail-closed classification
control.O: Local NS A1 bounded Abel-mass proxy diagnostic.
control.P: Bounded Type-I profiles must pass; deliberate bad profile must visibly fail.
control.R: Simulate Type-I-like shell energies and detect Abel/log-window boundedness.
control.S: Synthetic shell model only; no PDE Abel measure is constructed.

interpretation.bad_profile_meaning: The supercritical profile violates the envelope and the Abel/log-window mass bound, so the diagnostic is fail-closed rather than permissive.
interpretation.bounded_mass_proxy_meaning: For profiles satisfying ||P_j U||_2 <= M 2^(-j/2), 2^j||P_j U||_2^2 and its normalized Abel/log-window averages stay <= M^2.
interpretation.non_claims: No CKN-scale PDE defect measure, stationarity theorem, compensated leakage identity, NS Clay result, YM result, or unification promotion is proved.

profiles.description: Saturates the model envelope ||P_j U||_2 = M 2^(-j/2).
profiles.name: critical_type_i_envelope

profiles.description: Strictly bounded Type-I-like profile with mild logarithmic depletion.
profiles.name: log_depleted_type_i

profiles.description: Bounded envelope with deterministic low-amplitude shell oscillation.
profiles.name: oscillatory_bounded_type_i

profiles.description: Deliberately bad profile: envelope ratio grows exponentially with depth.
profiles.name: bad_supercritical_growth
